data.title: BingX Labs celebrates 1 year of Web3 & AI innovation with $16M in investments. Key investor in strategic partnerships.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, in Panama City, BingX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 AI firm, celebrated the one-year milestone of BingX Labs, its specialized investment and incubation division. During this time, BingX Labs has solidified its position as a significant strategic investor and partner. This comes following a year of success which has highlighted the division's importance in promoting innovation and supporting new ventures.

data.title: The Peach Cobbler Factory expands into larger US cities, growing beyond rural areas and smaller towns in the South.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, The Peach Cobbler Factory (PCF) brand and its franchisees are experiencing success in the market. Peach Cobbler, a beloved dessert in the US, has its roots in rural and small towns of the South. The popularity of PCF has translated into impressive numbers, with a growing number of franchisees contributing to its prosperity.
US CEA's Miran: Unemployment rate is stable and is not rising.

data.title: Hashgraph Group introduces IDTrust to rival Worldcoin and Microsoft, offering users full data control to outshine competitors. CEO Stefan Deiss stated.
data.description: According to Stefan Deiss, co-founder and CEO of THG, the IDTrust platform offers users complete autonomy over their data, distinguishing it from rivals such as Microsoft Entra.

data.title: Magna International's Q2 revenue declines 3% to $10.63 billion, surpassing analysts' $10.08 billion estimate.
data.description: Magna International (NYSE: MGA) saw a rise in shares following the release of their second-quarter fiscal 2025 earnings report. The company experienced a 3% decrease in quarterly revenue compared to the previous year, amounting to $10.63 billion, surpassing the analysts' expected $10.08 billion. This decline in revenue was attributed to a 6% reduction in light vehicle production in North America and a 2% decrease in Europe but was partly offset by a 5% growth in China. The drop in sales was also influenced by lower complete vehicle assembly volumes due to the discontinuation of production for models like the Jaguar I-Pace and E-Pace. Nonetheless, there was a 1% increase in global light vehicle production. More details on this news story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jerry Garcia Foundation celebrates Jerry Garcia's 83rd birthday and Grateful Dead's Diamond Anniversary with sunflower seed distributions at Dead & Company concerts in Golden Gate Park to promote pollinator preservation.
data.description: A non-profit organization is set to raise awareness for pollinator conservation by distributing sunflower seeds as part of an environmental effort during the upcoming Dead & Company concerts in Golden Gate Park. The initiative, taking place in San Francisco on August 1, 2025, coincides with the celebration of Jerry Garcia's 83rd birthday. The charity aims to distribute a significant number of sunflower seeds to concert attendees in order to support pollinator preservation.

data.title: US economy bounced back with 3% growth in Q2 after a 0.5% contraction, exceeding expectations. Trump celebrates this timely victory. Fed pressure ensues.
data.description: Following a sharp quarterly contraction, the U.S. economy rebounded strongly in the second quarter, with gross domestic product (GDP) growing at a 3% annualized pace. This marked a significant turnaround from the previous quarter, which saw a 0.5% contraction. The GDP expansion exceeded economists' expectations of a 2.4% growth rate and represented the strongest growth since the third quarter of the previous year. President Donald Trump hailed the 3% growth as better than anticipated, using the news as an opportunity to pressure Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell ahead of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting. Trump urged for a rate cut, emphasizing that there was no inflation to worry about and encouraging people to make purchases and refinance their homes.

data.title: Elegoo ends first phase of "ELEGOO With Her," backing women creators in home decor, fashion, cosplay, and education. 110+ sign-ups showcased.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on August 1, 2025, Elegoo, a fast-growing global smart manufacturing brand, revealed the completion of the initial stage of its "ELEGOO With Her" project. This initiative aims to empower female creators internationally using 3D printing technology. Over 110 individuals have signed up for the program.

data.title: Smart Communications receives a strategic investment from Cinven to boost global growth and innovation in regulated industries.
data.description: A significant investment has been made by Cinven in Smart Communications, aiming to facilitate global expansion, foster innovation, and enhance customer communications in regulated industries.

data.title: GitHub unveils BYOK feature for heightened security, giving admins more control over access. #Enterprise #GitHub #BYOK
data.description: GitHub has upgraded enterprise security by introducing Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) for GitHub Models. This enhancement provides administrators with increased authority over organizational access, improving overall security measures. This step signifies a significant advancement in ensuring secure access to vital company data.

data.title: Alabama CBD customers can visit open Sunmed™ | Your CBD Store® locations, carrying full inventory of premium hemp products.
data.description: Sunmed™ | Your CBD Store® is pleased to announce the opening of its locations in Alabama as of August 1, 2025. These outlets offer a wide selection of premium hemp and CBD products that are compliant, clinically proven, and of high quality. Customers in Alabama can now access a full inventory of these products at their convenience.

data.title: Shiba Inu's 5th birthday shows burn rate spiking to 5,800%, signaling potential breakout; SHIB price drops by 10.5% in a week.
data.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB) celebrated its fifth anniversary amidst a surge in bullish sentiment, with indications from on-chain activity and burn data suggesting a potential breakout. Currently, the cryptocurrency is priced at $0.00001227, showing a 10.5% decrease over the past seven days. In comparison, Dogecoin (DOGE) stands at $0.2077, marking a 10.2% drop, while Pepe (PEPE) is at $0.00001058, reflecting a 14% decline. Noteworthy traders in the crypto space have shared insights on the market. Vegeta highlights the robust monthly chart structure of Shiba Inu, emphasizing sustained demand over months, hinting at an imminent major movement. On the other hand, Trader Joe Swanson observes the formation of a classic cup-and-handle pattern. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cryptocurrency markets down as Bitcoin hits $115,000, Ethereum at $3,646. XRP and Dogecoin attempt bounce. Fed rate cut hopes spark rebound.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a dip on Friday morning before bouncing back due to optimism surrounding a potential September rate cut by the Federal Reserve following a weak jobs report. The prices for major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $115,487, Ethereum at $3,646, Solana at $168.37, XRP at $2.99, Dogecoin at $0.207, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001227. Notable statistics include an 8.6% increase in large transactions for Bitcoin and a 6.5% decrease for Ethereum. Daily active addresses rose by 5.3% for Bitcoin and dropped by 0.1% for Ethereum. Data from Coinglass revealed that 184,797 traders were liquidated, amounting to $758.65 million in the past 24 hours. SoSoValue data indicated net outflows of $114.8 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs on Wednesday, while spot Ethereum ETFs saw net inflows of $17 million. Observations from Stockmoney Lizards suggested that Bitcoin has partially closed its fair value gap and initiated a trading pattern. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
